"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\RayTracer.dir/objects.a
C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\RayTracer.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\RayTracer.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\g++.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\RayTracer.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o D:\Giannis\DUTH\Ray_Tracing_Project\bin\RayTracer.exe -Wl,--out-implib,D:\Giannis\DUTH\Ray_Tracing_Project\lib\libRayTracer.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\RayTracer.dir\linkLibs.rsp
